## ❌ Bug Report

### BUG-001 — BLOCKER 🚨
**Test Case:** TC-001  
**Title:** Google login button not visible on Mobile Safari (iOS 17)  
**Severity:** BLOCKER  
**Environment:** Mobile Safari, iOS 17.x, iPhone 12/13/14  
**Root Cause:** CSS conflict — existing `.login-form button` rule sets `display:none` for all button children, overriding the new `GoogleLoginButton` component. The fix in `LoginPage.tsx` did not scope the selector correctly.  
**Affected File:** `src/pages/LoginPage.tsx`, `src/styles/login.css`  
**Fix Required:** Scope CSS selector OR wrap GoogleLoginButton in a `<div>` outside the form.  
**Blocker Reason:** Feature is invisible to a major user segment (mobile users = ~40% of traffic).

---

### BUG-002 — MAJOR ⚠️
**Test Case:** TC-003  
**Title:** Google login redirect takes >5s on slow network  
**Severity:** Major  
**Environment:** Slow 3G (Chrome DevTools throttle), or flaky network  
**Root Cause:** `GoogleAuthService.verify_token()` in backend has no timeout. On mock endpoint, if response is delayed, the whole request hangs.  
**Affected File:** `backend/services/google_auth_service.py`  
**Fix Required:** Add `timeout=5.0` to the token verification HTTP call.  
**Not Blocker But:** Degrades UX for mobile users on slow connections — should be fixed before release.
